**Hypothesis testing**

| Test                | *p*-value adjustment? | Function used          |
| :------------------ | :-------------------- | :--------------------- |
| Fisher's exact test | Yes                   | `stats::fisher.test()` |

**Effect size estimation**

| Effect size  | CI available? | Function used             |
| :----------- | :------------ | :------------------------ |
| Cramer's *V* | Yes           | `effectsize::cramers_v()` |
